task_completion.description: Create the git_system directory in the Talon user folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal, or editor tree showing the existence of the directory path C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\git_system.
A text editor showing git_system.py with code defining a Talon Module (e.g., mod = Module()) and a list named 'git_branch' (e.g., mod.list('git_branch')).

task_completion.description: Define the 'update_git_branches' action in git_system.py with specific string replacements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing git_system.py with an action named 'update_git_branches'. The function must execute 'git branch --format="%(refname:short)"' and contain logic to replace slashes (/), dashes (-), and dots (.) with spaces.

task_completion.description: Create git_system.talon with a terminal-specific context.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing git_system.talon starting with a context header restricting it to a terminal (e.g., 'app: windows_terminal', 'app: cmd', or similar terminal application) followed by a '-' separator.

task_completion.description: Define branch-related voice commands in git_system.talon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In git_system.talon, the presence of voice commands 'git refresh branches:' (which calls the update_git_branches action) and 'git checkout {user.git_branch}:'.

task_completion.description: Define basic git voice commands in git_system.talon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In git_system.talon, the presence of voice commands 'git status:', 'git add all:', and 'git commit <user.text>:'.

integrity.description: Verify that the files are saved in the correct target directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor's title bar, file tree, or terminal output confirms the files are actually saved in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\git_system\, rather than just being unsaved buffers.

integrity.description: Verify that branch names are retrieved dynamically via the git command, not hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The update_git_branches action uses a subprocess or similar method to run the git branch command, without containing a hardcoded list of expected branch names.

integrity.description: Verify that the git operations target the correct repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: The update_git_branches action explicitly references C:\workspace\requests as the working directory (cwd) for the git subprocess command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory for Talon module: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\git_system. Target repository path for git operations: C:\workspace\requests.
